questions: Does an underlying cause for the fistula exist? (Yes/No)
Is surgical procedure needed for eradication of the tract? (Yes/No)
Is the fistula complex (high transsphincteric, suprasphincteric, extrasphincteric)? (Yes/No)
Is the fistula recurrent after previous fistulotomy? (Yes/No)
Is the patient female and the fistula anterior? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Crohn’s disease? (Yes/No)
